_comment: Synthetic Teams channel posts for the Brightwater delivery channel. Used for the scope-discussion (email+chat) and deliverables-due (tracker+chat) multi-signal questions.

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: Defect burn-down update: 1 of 2 integration defects closed. The second is a date-format edge case, fix in review. Cutover for 26-JUN still looks achievable.

teams_messages.author: PPL-003
teams_messages.text: Heads up: client asked for a self-service reporting module. That is NOT in the SOW. I've emailed the team — we log a change request with effort, nobody starts it until approved. Do not absorb new scope.

teams_messages.author: PPL-003
teams_messages.text: Deliverables due this week: integration test report (Amir, on track for Friday) and the cutover dry-run. Cutover go-live is the 26th. We're green on the test report, amber on cutover until the last defect closes.

teams_messages.author: PPL-001
teams_messages.text: Thanks all. I'm covering for Owen — the engagement tracker is our single source of truth for deliverables and dates. Keep it current; I'm reporting from it.

teams_messages.author: PPL-010
teams_messages.text: Data profiling for the cutover is done and handed to Amir. Nothing else from me on the reporting module — understood it's out of scope.
